message.abstract:
<jats:title>Withdrawal Statement</jats:title>
                <jats:p>The authors have withdrawn this manuscript because significant edits have been made, and the current version of the manuscript differs substantially from the version originally submitted. Therefore, the authors do not wish this work to be cited as a reference. If you have any questions, please contact the corresponding author.</jats:p>
title: WITHDRAWN: An equity-focused comparison of the COVID-19 vaccine rollout plans across six Canadian provinces
